articles.title_en: Kiev’s attacks on Russian oil facilities may lead to further rise in prices, Kremlin warns
articles.lead_en: Oil supplies to the global market have greatly declined due to developments in the Strait of Hormuz, and if some of our oil supplies fail to reach the market, prices will grow even higher, while they have already reached the $120 per barrel level, Kremlin Spokesman Dmitry Peskov
